scope: Non-test TypeScript sources under mekann/ (ripgrep line count of the literal string 'as any'; excludes *.test.ts, *.spec.ts, tests/, __tests__/).
notes: Lower this number whenever a cleanup lands; never raise it without justification. ESLint (eslint.config.mjs) additionally enforces @typescript-eslint/no-explicit-any at 'error' for files in the ERROR_TIER list (zero explicit-any), and at 'warn' for the rest.
